// WARN: This file is automatically generated. Any work done here, and not
use crate::lang::lib::ui::ui_types::emphasis::emphasis_model::Emphasis;

pub fn css_variable_to_emphasis(variable: &str) -> Option<Emphasis> {
      match variable { {% for emph in Emphasis::iter() %}
        "{{emph.to_css_variable_group().background}}" => Some(Emphasis::{{emph | title}}),
        "{{emph.to_css_variable_group().foreground}}" => Some(Emphasis::{{emph | title}}), {% endfor %} 
        _ => None
       }
}
